title: Maces Galore
description: Adds 3D maces that change models with enchantments.
body:
![Maces](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b95b1763f294c1e2fcda19cbe4e2ed62c2c5ed3f_0.webp)

Maces Galore adds 3D maces that change their models when you enchant them, for Density it it goes to its firt model on level 1-2 then second on 3-4 and third on level 5, wind burst and breach don't change from level to level, but still look decently cool. There will be a list of combinations below
- Density + Wind Burst
- Breach + Wind Burst
Just as a warning, if you do any other enchantments besides the combinations, the mace will lose it's special varient and revert to the normal 3D look but with an enchantment glint.
